relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Jesus gives the twelve authority to heal and release.
The twelve are named as sent ones.
Ordinary and unlikely people are gathered into mission.
Even betrayal is named inside the circle.
The mission begins with a focused path.
They are sent first to the lost sheep of Israel.
Their message is the nearness of heaven’s reign.
They are to heal and give freely from what they freely received.
The mission is not built on stored wealth.
The worker travels in trust.
Hospitality becomes the mission’s dwelling place.
Peace is offered to the house.
Peace rests where it is received and returns where it is not.
Rejection is released rather than carried.
Refusing the message carries weight.
They are sheep among wolves, called to serpent-wisdom and dove-innocence.
Human systems will resist them.
Even trial becomes testimony before rulers and nations.
When pressured, they are not to anxiously script the moment.
The Father’s Spirit will speak in them.
The message can expose division even in families.
Endurance carries them through hatred around the name.
They are permitted to flee and continue the work.
A disciple shares the teacher’s path.
The household of the teacher will be treated as the teacher is treated.
Hidden things will be unveiled, so fear loses its throne.
What is whispered becomes rooftop proclamation.
They are taught to fear deeper reality, not merely bodily threat.
Even sparrows fall within the Father’s knowing.
Even the hairs of the head are counted.
They are worth more than many sparrows.
Confession before people echoes before the Father.
Denial before people has its own echo.
Peace does not mean avoiding the sword of truth.
Allegiance to the path may divide inherited bonds.
Conflict can arise inside the household itself.
Love of family is reordered under the greater call.
The cross names costly following.
The life clutched is lost; the life surrendered in love is found.
Receiving the sent ones receives Jesus and the Sender.
Receiving a prophet or righteous one shares in their reward.
Even a cup of cold water given to a little one is remembered.
